listings.title: BIG AUGER ROBOT FOR SALE
listings.body: This robot has the following components (2) Magmotors S28-BP-400x (current equivalent model retails for $466 each) (2) Team Whyachi P3 4:1 gearboxes (retail for $465 each) (1) RoboteQ HDC2460 DC motor controller configured as 2 channel, 24v, 60amps per channel (retails for $675) Includes robot chassis, augers, bearings, sprockets, chains, batteries, battery boxes, wiring, robot workstand, spare parts. Here is a video of the robot: https://youtu.be/wvEwS53oM2U This robot had at-most 4 hours of use just to prove concept and a few demonstrations. The motors/gearboxes/controller alone are worth over $2500! Robot is currently disassembled. $1800 or best offer.  Will also consider selling motors/gearboxes/controller seperately. Pick-up in Yorktown NY.
